betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Ionized Particles§f

§aA fusion byproduct that can be duplicated — key to schrabidic acid and end-game materials!§f

§bIonized Particles§f are a special item only obtainable in fusion reactors. Required for balefire and the most end-game materials. They can also be liquefied into helium-4 for fuel.

§6Production§f:
§b• Fusion Reactor§f — all plasmas except He-4-Oxygen and Balefire-Antimatter produce them. He-3-Deuterium is fastest (50% faster production)
§b• Chlorinated Petroleum Wax + Ionic Gel§f — infinite duplication loop (see below)

§6Duplication Mechanic§f (§e50% efficiency per cycle§f):
§bStep 1§f — §bIndustrial Mixer§f: 1 Ionized Particle + 200 mB Liquid Hydrogen + 1,000 mB Water → 1,000 mB §eIonic Gel§f
§bStep 2§f — §bOre Acidizer§f: 500 mB Ionic Gel + Chlorinated Petroleum Wax → §e1 Ionized Particle§f
§b• Note§f: Mixer produces 1,000 mB gel, acidizer consumes 500 mB per particle — effectively doubling yield
§b• Requires§f: steady Chlorinated Petroleum Wax supply and at least 1 initial Ionized Particle to bootstrap

§6Key Uses§f:
§b• Flashgold RBMK Fuel§f
§b• Helium-4§f — liquefy for fuel
§b• Electronium§f
§b• Schrabidic Acid§f — key ingredient

§eTip§f: The duplication loop is essential for bulk ionized particle production. Set up the Mixer + Acidizer with a conveyor splitter to send new particles where needed. Only need 1 initial particle from fusion to bootstrap infinite production!
